summary: Recording source unknown with no reported audio issues; the concert elicits mixed feelings, praised by one reviewer as a personal milestone and dismissed by another as a band in decline.
review: One reviewer (2 ★) bluntly calls the performance "a band in decay" without mentioning sound quality. Another reviewer (5 ★) passionately defends the show, sharing a personal story but offering no technical commentary. With no concrete details on recording or musical specifics, opinions are sharply divided.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews are contradictory (2 ★ vs 5 ★) and provide no concrete information on sound or performance details, leading to a neutral overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about audio clarity, mix, or source; recording type cannot be determined from the reviews.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers did not discuss set structure, pacing, or specific song performance.
